UI_PAV_AimStanceOnlyTooltip: Active only while aiming a weapon (right-click held).
UI_PAV_RangeTooltip: How far around the player walls fade out, in tiles.
UI_PAV_CutawayActiveInVehicleTooltip: Keeps wall cutaway active while in a vehicle. When off, cutaway runs only on foot.
UI_PAV_FixB42Tooltip: Prevents upper-floor walls from vanishing next to player-built structures.
UI_PAV_FadeNWTreesTooltip: Fades trees the character can see past, revealing what's behind them.
UI_PAV_TreeFadeRangeTooltip: How far around the player trees fade out, in tiles.
UI_PAV_JavaMissingDescription: WARNING: PeekAView's Java component is not loaded — the settings below have no effect. You declined loading the mod's JAR through ZombieBuddy. Re-enable PeekAView's Java code in ZombieBuddy to activate the mod.
